name_en: Chanel🌊 25C ❄️ Early Spring Series CF Braided Handle Bag AS5298 Lambskin with gold metal. Exquisite braided handle design, classic chain ⛓️. Simple yet sophisticated style. Exquisite and elegant, exuding a noble, rich-girl vibe. Simply beautiful. Size: 10.5×18×7cm
